text:
There was a tiny cat named Whiskers. Whiskers loved walking through the fields. One morning he climbed up onto a haystack. It was quite tall.

A big wolf saw him from afar. His mouth curled into a sneaky smile.

Whiskers froze.

The wolf yawned.

Then...

Just then three things happened!

First, a flock of birds swooped down filling the air. They were noisy.

Second, a huge rainstorm began!

Third, Whiskers leaped off the haystack!

He landed perfectly amidst a puddle.

He purred contentedly.

That night he ate berries. They were his favorites.
